description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a combination of brick and white plaster exterior walls, set on a rectangular grassy plot with a paved driveway leading to a single-car garage. The roof is a dark gray gable style with two prominent chimneys and several skylights. Large vertical windows are featured on both the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light. The house includes a cantilevered balcony and a small porch area at the main entrance, which is slightly recessed and protected by an overhang. The garage is integrated into the main structure and is finished in white, contrasting with the brickwork. The landscaping is minimal, with a simple lawn surrounding the house and no visible fencing or elaborate garden features.
description: A modern two-story brick and white house with a gable roof, large vertical windows, and an integrated single-car garage on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, and driveway, with the gable roof and two chimneys visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the white garage structure, and the arrangement of windows along the brick facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large vertical windows, a small porch or deck, and the back lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick wall, vertical window arrangement, and the connection between the garage and main house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a small porch, overhang, and modern door adjacent to the garage
